nodes.name: config.ini
nodes.summary: INI configuration file for the Iceberg e2e test harness, specifying database connection details (host, port, user, database name) for the RisingWave instance under test.

nodes.name: pyproject.toml
nodes.summary: Python project configuration for the Iceberg e2e test scripts, declaring Poetry dependencies (pyspark, pyiceberg, psycopg2) needed to run Spark-based Iceberg integration tests.

nodes.name: start_spark_connect_server.sh
nodes.summary: Shell script that downloads and launches a Spark Connect server with Iceberg support, configuring the REST catalog URL and MinIO S3 endpoint for use in Iceberg e2e tests.
